top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE strftime('%Y', l.Date) = '1984'
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) < 50
  AND l.PLT BETWEEN 150 AND 450;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE strftime('%Y', l.Date) = '1984'
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) < 50
  AND l.PLT >= 150 AND l.PLT <= 450;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE strftime('%Y', l.Date) = '1984'
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) < 50
  AND l.PLT BETWEEN 150 AND 450;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE strftime('%Y', l.Date) = '1984'
  AND (CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) < 50
  AND l.PLT >= 150 AND l.PLT <= 450;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE strftime('%Y', l.Date) = '1984'
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) < 50
  AND l.PLT >= 150 AND l.PLT <= 450;

  AND (CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) < 50

WHERE strftime('%Y', l.Date) = '1984'
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) < 50

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE strftime('%Y', l.Date) = '1984'
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) < 50
  AND l.PLT BETWEEN 150 AND 450;
